summary: Unified Status Model (Journey State + Attention Status) verified. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements display correctly. Two-badge layout working - Journey (calm colors) + Attention (bold). needingAction=4 matches athletes with primary attention. Blockers outscore follow-ups. Secondary signals expandable via '+N more issues' link.
critical_code_review_comments: JOURNEY_STATE_MAP correctly maps pipeline stages to labels: Offer→'Offer Received', Campus Visit→'Visiting Schools', Initial Contact→'Reaching Out'
URGENCY_WEIGHTS correctly configured: severity=0.40, time_sensitivity=0.30, opportunity_cost=0.20, pipeline_impact=0.10
Blockers can have 'critical' severity (score ~73), non-blockers cap at 'high' even with high urgency
_compute_unified_statuses() correctly collects signals from all 3 sources: decision engine, school health, pod issues
derive_attention_status() scores and sorts signals, picks highest-urgency as primary
RosterSection.js correctly splits athletes into needsAction (has primary) and allClear (no primary)
AthleteRow shows two badges: journey_state + attention_status.primary (if exists)
AllClearRow shows only journey state badge
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Status Model is WORKING. Key verification points: 1) Lucas (athlete_5) at Offer has journey='Offer Received' + attention='At Risk' (school cooling off). 2) Emma (athlete_1) at Campus Visit has journey='Visiting Schools' + attention='Blocker' (2 Overdue Actions, score 73) + 3 secondary signals. 3) Marcus (athlete_3) at Campus Visit has journey='Visiting Schools' + attention='Blocker' (2 Overdue Actions). 4) Sarah (athlete_4) at Initial Contact has journey='Reaching Out' + NO attention (All Clear). 5) Frontend RosterSection shows two-badge layout with '+N more issues' expandable for secondary. 6) needingAction count = 4 in hero card and section header.

backend_api: TestUnifiedStatusAPIResponse - 2 tests PASSED (journey_state and attention_status objects present)
TestJourneyStateMapping - 5 tests PASSED (Lucas=Offer Received, Emma/Marcus/Olivia=Visiting Schools, Sarah=Reaching Out)
TestAttentionStatusPrimary - 4 tests PASSED (Emma=Blocker, Marcus=Blocker, Lucas=At Risk, Sarah=None)
TestBlockerOutscoresFollowup - 1 test PASSED (blocker score >= followup score)
TestSecondarySignals - 1 test PASSED (Emma has 3 secondary signals)
TestNeedingActionCount - 1 test PASSED (needingAction=4 matches athletes with primary)
TestJourneyIndependentOfAttention - 1 test PASSED (journey preserved regardless of attention)
TestAllClearSection - 1 test PASSED (Sarah in All Clear with only journey badge)
frontend_ui: Dashboard shows 5 journey badges with correct labels VERIFIED
Dashboard shows 4 attention badges (BLOCKER x3, AT RISK x1) VERIFIED
Emma: Journey='Visiting Schools', Attention='Blocker', '+3 more issues' expandable VERIFIED
Marcus: Journey='Visiting Schools', Attention='Blocker', '+1 more issue' VERIFIED
Lucas: Journey='Offer Received', Attention='At Risk' (school cooling off) VERIFIED
Sarah: Journey='Reaching Out', NO attention badge, in All Clear section VERIFIED
Hero card shows NEED ATTENTION=4 VERIFIED
NEEDS ATTENTION section header shows count 4 VERIFIED
ALL CLEAR section shows count 1 (Sarah) VERIFIED
Secondary signals expand when clicking '+N more issues' VERIFIED
